title: Made in Abyss Soundtrack
description: This resource pack adds all the tracks from the Made in Abyss.
body: This resource pack adds all the tracks from the Made in Abyss. You'll have to find out yourself which songs play where, but i've done my best to make them fit where they play as I didn't want their placement to be random and unfitting. Advantages: Audio quality (FLAC to OGG) Music distribution (All tracks from the OST were used)
